SRC="client/public/qirox-icon.png"
OUT="client/public"

# Square icons (add white background for non-transparent formats like .ico)
for SIZE in 16 32 48 70 96 120 144 150 152 167 180 192 256 310 512; do
  convert "$SRC" -resize ${SIZE}x${SIZE} -background none -gravity center -extent ${SIZE}x${SIZE} "$OUT/icon-${SIZE}.png" 2>/dev/null
  echo "✓ icon-${SIZE}.png"
done

# favicon sizes
convert "$SRC" -resize 16x16   -background none -gravity center -extent 16x16   "$OUT/favicon-16.png"
convert "$SRC" -resize 32x32   -background none -gravity center -extent 32x32   "$OUT/favicon-32.png"
convert "$SRC" -resize 48x48   -background none -gravity center -extent 48x48   "$OUT/favicon-48.png"
convert "$SRC" -resize 256x256 -background none -gravity center -extent 256x256 "$OUT/icon-256.png"

# favicon.ico (multi-size)
convert "$SRC" \( -clone 0 -resize 16x16  \) \( -clone 0 -resize 32x32  \) \( -clone 0 -resize 48x48  \) -delete 0 "$OUT/favicon.ico"
echo "✓ favicon.ico"

# favicon.png = 32x32
convert "$SRC" -resize 32x32 -background none -gravity center -extent 32x32 "$OUT/favicon.png"
echo "✓ favicon.png"

# Apple touch icons (white background for iOS)
for SIZE in 120 152 167 180; do
  convert "$SRC" -resize ${SIZE}x${SIZE} -background white -gravity center -extent ${SIZE}x${SIZE} "$OUT/apple-touch-icon-${SIZE}.png" 2>/dev/null
done
convert "$SRC" -resize 180x180 -background white -gravity center -extent 180x180 "$OUT/apple-touch-icon.png"
echo "✓ apple-touch-icons"

# Maskable icons (10% padding, white bg)
for SIZE in 192 512; do
  PAD=$(echo "$SIZE * 9 / 100" | bc)
  INNER=$((SIZE - PAD * 2))
  convert "$SRC" -resize ${INNER}x${INNER} -background white -gravity center -extent ${SIZE}x${SIZE} "$OUT/icon-${SIZE}-maskable.png" 2>/dev/null
  echo "✓ icon-${SIZE}-maskable.png"
done

# Wide tile (310x150)
convert "$SRC" -resize 100x100 -background "#282828" -gravity center -extent 310x150 "$OUT/icon-310x150.png"
echo "✓ icon-310x150.png"

echo "All icons generated!"
